chain.thought: Explanation: Top-10 finishes occurred in 2001 (4th), 2002 (2nd), 2005 (2nd/6th), 2006 (1st/2nd/7th), and 2007 (1st). 2011 was a DQ (not top 10). The longest consecutive streak of years with top-10 finishes is 2005–2007, which is 3 years.

judge_thought:
